failures.description: The agent fabricated an item ID and price instead of using the returned catalog evidence.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to answer the cheapest available Smartphone using ProductCatalogSearch evidence. The tool output at index 3 listed two available Smartphones, with item 5339029584 priced at $1128.99 as the cheapest. At index 4, the Executor introduced item 0000000000 priced at $0.01, which is absent from the tool result and contradicts the evidence. This invented item and price directly determined the final answer. The failure was not resolved later; the Evaluator approved the same unsupported answer.
